headline: Peace Hopes Revive Rally
summary: US stocks rally as yields and oil fall on Iran peace hopes; hot inflation data keeps Fed decision in focus. Read the full analysis here.

headline: Prologis (PLD) Stock After 43% One-Year Rally Is The Price Still Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether Prologis at around US$148.74 offers genuine value or mainly headline appeal, this article walks you through what the current price might really be telling you. The stock has returned 2.9% over the past week, 5.8% over the past month, 15.3% year to date and 43.5% over the past year. This recent performance is front of mind for anyone thinking about risk and reward. Recent coverage of Prologis has focused on its position as a major industrial REIT and the way...
